title: Exclusive: Samsung to double AI mobile devices to 800 million units this year | Reuters
full_text: Exclusive: Samsung to double AI mobile devices to 800 million units this year | Reuters - Samsung's mobile devices with "Galaxy AI" features will double to 800 mln units this year, co-CEO says - Galaxy AI is powered by Google's Gemini, Samsung's own Bixiby assistant - Co-CEO says Samsung not immune
